title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.390 - Officer Michael Barwick Memorial Highway designated for a portion of I-44 in St. Louis City
text:
227.390.  Officer Michael Barwick Memorial Highway designated for a portion of I-44 in St. Louis City. — The portion of Interstate 44 from the city limits of the city not within a county east to the intersection of Kingshighway shall be designated the "Officer Michael Barwick Memorial Highway".  Costs for such designation shall be paid by private donation.
(L. 2007 H.B. 56)
